master_row.title: 4D Effective Theory Each Mode $Phin$ Appears as Massive Field: R_KK ∼ 10^-6
master_row.canonical_statement: n{5D Ansatz} Consider 5D spacetime with compactified extra dimension: \begin{equation} ds^2_{(5)} = g_{\mu\nu}^{(4)}dx^\mu dx^\nu + e^{2\sigma}\left(dy + A_\mu dx^\mu\right)^2 \end{equation} \subsection{Fourier Mode Expansion} Fields periodic in $y$ with radius $R_\text{KK}$: \begin{equation} \Phi(x^\mu, y) = \sum_{n=-\infty}^{\infty} \phi_n(x^\mu) e^{iny/R_\text{KK}} \end{equation} \subsection{4D Effective Theory} Each mode $\phi_n$ appears as massive field: \begin{equation} \left(\Box_{(4)} + \frac{n^2}{R_\text{KK}^2}\right)\phi_n = 0 \end{equation} \textbf{Critical Observation}: If $R_\text{KK} \sim 10^{-6}$ m, then: \begin{equation} f_n = \frac{nc}{2\pi R_\text{KK}} \sim n \times 50 \text{ GHz} \end{equation} This is in the \emph{acoustic-accessible regime} for ultrasonics! \section{Resonance Conditions} \subsection{Mode Coupling Criterion} \begin{theorem}[Harmonic-KK Resonance] Magneto-acoustic modes couple to KK tower when: \begin{equation} \omega_{nl}^\text{ac} = \omega_{n'l'}^B + \frac{mc}{R_\text{KK}} \quad (m \in \mathbb{Z}) \end{equation} \end{theorem} \subsection{Selection Rules}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘4D Effective Theory Each mode $phin$ appears as massive field’.
